request.prompt: Medium close shot of a graphite stand mixer's tilt head lowering, the wire whisk descending into a polished stainless bowl half-filled with pale, soft dough. The whisk begins to rotate, drawing the dough into a slow glossy spiral. A delicate cloud of flour lifts and drifts through a shaft of late-morning window light. Shallow depth of field, 50mm macro feel, anamorphic flare on the chrome. Color grade is warm-neutral, A24-flavored, no garish saturation. Vertical 9:16.
